recipe.ground: Single dominant ground color — warm off-white, cream, or deep black; no gradients
recipe.type: Oversized wordmark or logotype as primary visual element; type IS the layout
recipe.accent: One restrained accent or none; palette stays 2-3 tones max
recipe.photo: No photography; illustration or 3D only if subordinate to type mass
recipe.space: Extreme negative space; generous margins; nothing competes with the wordmark
recipe.motion: Slow, weighted reveal — letterforms settle or scale in; no kinetic distraction

recipe.ground: White or light neutral; clean field with no atmospheric treatment
recipe.type: Grotesk or mono typeface; type set on strict baseline/column grid; hierarchy via size and weight alone
recipe.accent: Minimal — hairline rules, small numerals, metadata labels; color used sparingly if at all
recipe.photo: Documentary or object photography cropped flush to grid; no bleed chaos
recipe.space: Structured negative space driven by column math; breathing room is deliberate not accidental
recipe.motion: Functional transitions — fade or slide on axis; no expressive animation

recipe.ground: Near-black or deep charcoal field; darkness is the canvas, not a mood overlay
recipe.type: Editorial serif for headlines; grotesk for metadata; contrast achieved through lightness not hue
recipe.accent: Muted or zero chroma accents — no neon pops; let type and space carry hierarchy
recipe.photo: High-contrast or duotone imagery integrated into dark field; edges dissolve into ground
recipe.space: Generous, cinematic spacing; sections breathe like magazine spreads
recipe.motion: Slow dissolves, parallax scrolling; contemplative not energetic

recipe.ground: Cream, blush, or warm off-white base; ground radiates softness without being pastel-generic
recipe.type: Editorial serif or refined grotesk; type set with literary spacing; unhurried reading rhythm
recipe.accent: Warm low-saturation tones; color suggests paper and ink, not screen primaries
recipe.photo: Soft, warm-lit photography or none; images feel tactile — print-adjacent
recipe.space: Generous margins; whitespace is warmth; layout feels handset not automated
recipe.motion: Gentle fade-ins; no aggressive entrance animations; content arrives calmly

recipe.ground: Pure black or raw white; no atmospheric treatment — ground is a blank wall
recipe.type: Heavy grotesk or display sans at aggressive scale; type used as graphic mass
recipe.accent: Single maximum-chroma primary or secondary — red, yellow, electric blue; one color, full commitment
recipe.photo: Avoided or used as raw document; no retouching aesthetic
recipe.space: Tight or intentionally crowded; space is earned not given; OR extreme emptiness as provocation
recipe.motion: Abrupt cuts, instant state changes, no easing; motion is structural not decorative

recipe.ground: High-chroma warm or saturated color field; ground is energized not neutral
recipe.type: Rounded or friendly display type; type may be extruded, inflated, or sculpted
recipe.accent: Multiple high-chroma hues coexist; harmony via saturation consistency not hue restriction
recipe.photo: 3D rendered sculptural objects as hero; soft studio lighting; objects have material weight
recipe.space: Objects float in space; negative space is active — it gives objects room to breathe and cast
recipe.motion: Rotation, inflation, gentle float loops; physics-adjacent — objects have implied mass

recipe.ground: White or very light neutral; ground disappears — content is foreground
recipe.type: Mono or grotesk for metadata, labels, captions; type serves wayfinding not expression
recipe.accent: Sparse and semantic — accent marks state or category, not decoration
recipe.photo: Process screens, artifacts, documentation; imagery is evidentiary not atmospheric
recipe.space: Structured breathing room between content blocks; layout sequences like a report
recipe.motion: Scroll-driven reveals; content loads in reading order; no theatrical entrance

recipe.ground: White, light gray, or cream; ground is neutral enough to disappear behind structured data
recipe.type: Monospaced typeface throughout or as primary voice; type signals system, code, precision
recipe.accent: Gray scale with one functional highlight; restraint is the aesthetic
recipe.photo: None or minimal; iconography is geometric and constructed
recipe.space: Character-grid aligned spacing; space feels measured in ems not pixels
recipe.motion: Terminal-style text rendering; cursor blinks; data appears not animates
